characters.name: Blu
characters.description: BluCharacter InfoNameUnknownNicknameBluOccupationSingerRomancesJamie Andrews(fling)Series InfoPlayed byCassie SteeleFirst appearanceWe BelongFinal apperancePossessionEpisode count5 Bluwas one of the top contestants to win onInstant Star 4who but ended up signing with Jamie and Paegan's record label instead, as their first artist. Blu is a contestant on Season 4 of Instant Star and is a frontrunner to win due to her edgy style and great voice. Paegan, Jamie and Zeppelin are instantly impressed with her and manage to poach her from G Major as the contestants are narrowed down to just three.

characters.name: Darius Mills
characters.description: Darius Millsis a major character in Instant Star. In Season Two he runs G Major. It is later revealed that he covered for his sister who killed Angie, the woman Tommy cheated on her with. Darius is first seen when he pulls Jude from the cover of a popular magazine and Tommy thinks it's because of the grudge they've had together for years. Tommy takes Jude to Darius' mansion party to try and impress him and win the cover back. Tommy has drinks with Darius and he tells him that Jude lost the cover because she isn't marketable enough, but Tommy begs him to listen to her new song. Darius gives in and plays "Let Me Fall", he likes the song but still isn't convinced she's the right choice. Later, Darius is convinced to give Jude the cover after she (unknowingly) impressed his sister, Portia.

characters.name: Jaime Andrews
characters.description: Jamie Andrewsis a fictional character from the hit Canadian drama Instant Star. He is the childhood friend of lead characterJude Harrison. Jamie is a schoolmate of Jude's, and the two have apparently been friends for a very long time when the series begins. Initially, Jamie is shown to be somewhat of a nerd. He makes up for this by being extremely sensitive and trustworthy. He is also shown to be fiercely loyal to Jude, perhaps because he was in love with her for a time.
characters.personality_section: Initially, Jamie is shown to be somewhat of a nerd. He makes up for this by being extremely sensitive and trustworthy. He is also shown to be fiercely loyal to Jude, perhaps because he was in love with her for a time.

characters.name: Sadie Harrison
characters.description: Sadieis Jude's "perfect" sister they never really got along until season 4. Her name is possibly inspired by the Beatles' song "Sexy Saddie". When we first met her in season 1, Sadie was jealous of her younger sister's fame and all of her parents' attention being fixated on Jude, despite Sadie herself excelling in sport and academics. She was shown being mean to Jude and calling her names and the two often feud. Their father Stuart, decides to spend more time with Sadie and even offers to treat her to a trip to Europe. Sadie is ecstatic and they go to the travel agent to plan it, where she is helped by Stuart's friend Yvette who gives them a brochure. Sadie later finds a romantic message addressed to Stuart inside and Sadie realises her father is having an affair. Stuart begs Sadie not to say anything and she does, for a time, but crumbles under the pressure and lies and starts acting out. She starts to bond with Tommy and they even share a kiss which makes Jude jealous. Jude later finds out about their father's affair and tells their mom, who kicks him out and their family is shattered. Jude and Sadie bond over this and even start to find familiar ground in their trauma.

characters.name: Shay Mills
characters.description: Shay(Shay Mills) is a famous rapper and nephew to Darius, who catches the attention of Jude Harrison.  G Major are forced to welcome Shay to their studio while he works on his new album with Tommy. In-turn, Jude is forced to work in a shabby studio in the next room and has to take a break from Tommy's producing for a while.

characters.name: Shay Mills
characters.description: Shay(Shay Mills) is a famous rapper and nephew to Darius, who catches the attention of Jude Harrison. characters.name: Stuart Harrison
characters.description: Stuart Harrisonis the father of Jude and Sadie and the ex-husband of Victoria. Stuart has been Jude's biggest supporter of her music career and is ecstatic when she winsInstant Starand signs a record contract. Despite his wife Victoria's concerns over her school future, Stuart is more understanding that she should put all of her effort into making it. When Sadie starts acting out, Stuart realises that he has been giving all of his attention to Jude and as a treat to Sadie, takes her to a travel agent to plan a trip to Europe to cheer Sadie up. While there she meets agent Yvette who is a friend of Stuarts and gets him a great deal.

characters.name: Tommy Quincy
characters.description: Tom "Tommy Quincy" DuTois(played byTim Rozon) is a fictional character from theCanadianTV showInstant Star. His family resides in New Brunswick, Canada.  When Jude wins the first season ofInstant Star, Tommy is assigned to be her producer from the record label G Major. Jude is initially annoyed, not taking Tommy seriously due to his career as a former pop-group singer. They clash but she soon grows to admire him and his talent, even surprising him with a kiss him after a gig but he has to reject her due to her only being 15.

characters.name: Tommy Quincy
characters.description: Tom "Tommy Quincy" DuTois(played byTim Rozon) is a fictional character from theCanadianTV showInstant Star. His family resides in New Brunswick, Canada.  When Jude wins the first season ofInstant Star, Tommy is assigned to be her producer from the record label G Major. Jude is initially annoyed, not taking Tommy seriously due to his career as a former pop-group singer. They clash but she soon grows to admire him and his talent, even surprising him with a kiss him after a gig but he has to reject her due to her only being 15.

characters.name: Victoria Harrison
characters.description: Victoria Harrisonis the mother of Jude and Sadie and the ex-wife of Stuart. Victoria is happy when Jude wins the first season ofInstant Starbut wants Jude to stay focused on school and education as it's not guaranteed she's going to be able to make a long-term career out of music and thus, she often clashes with her husband Stuart. They are going through a crisis in their marriage and are seeing a marriage counsellor but are heading in the right direction for patching things up. However, Victoria soon learns that Stuart has been having an affair, and she had to hear it from her own daughter Jude. Victoria is furious and betrayed by her husband and kicks him out of the house.
